items.title: HyperMenu
items.text: • HyperMenu is an easy-to-use Among Us cheat menu with a simple GUI and lots of useful modules, based on MalumMenu by scp222thj and astra1dev.

items.title: About HyperMenu
items.text:
• HyperMenu was developed by ADHyperActive.
  • MalumMenu, which HyperMenu was forked from, was developed by scp222thj and astra1dev.
  • Credit goes to the developers of MalumMenu.

items.title: Discord
items.text:
• HyperMenu Discord: https://discord.gg/HbrTNZBQk
  • MalumMenu Discord: https://discord.gg/GZKcdkFD5

items.title: Movement ↔️
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default Fake Revive Allows you to walk through walls like a ghost Button NoClip Allows you to walk through walls like a ghost Toggle Off Invert Controls Inverts movement from WASD keys / controller. Toggle Off Speed Allows you to adjust player / ghost speed Slider

items.title: Teleport
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default to Cursor Teleport by right-clicking with your cursor. Works best with the ZoomOut cheat Toggle Off to Player Teleport to a player's position by selecting them Menu

items.title: ESP 👁️
items.text:
HyperMenu's ESP cheats are completely client-side, and thus undetectable by anticheat

Cheat Description Type Default See Player Info See level, platform, and host status for all players through their nametag Toggle Off See Roles See every player's role through their nametag Toggle Off See Ghosts Allows you to see ghosts, protections, and ghost chat even if you are alive Toggle Off No Shadows Removes all shadows, allowing you to see during blackouts and even through wallsAlso, lets you see through spore clouds in the Fungle Jungle Toggle Off Reveal Votes Reveals votes as they are being cast rather than at the end of the meetingAlso, lets you see colored votes even if votes are set to anonymous Toggle Off See Lobby Info ? Toggle Off

items.title: Camera
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default Zoom Out Allows you to zoom-out the player's camera using your mouse's scrollwheel Toggle Off Spectate Allows you to pick a player to spectate with your camera Menu Freecam Allows you to freely move your camera around without also moving your player Toggle Off

items.title: Tracers
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default Crewmates Shows tracer lines for alive crewmates (color: cyan) Toggle Off Impostors Shows tracer lines for alive impostors (color: red) Toggle Off Ghosts Shows tracer lines for ghosts (color: white) Toggle Off Dead Bodies Shows tracer lines for dead bodies on the ground (color: yellow) Toggle Off Color-based Changes the color of tracer lines to the color of their players Toggle Off Distance-based Changes the color of tracer lines based on the distance of their players Toggle Off

items.title: Minimap
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default Crewmates Changes the map so that it shows the position of every alive crewmate (color: cyan) Toggle Off Impostors Changes the map so that it shows the position of every alive impostor (color: red) Toggle Off Ghosts Changes the map so that it shows the position of every ghost (color: white) Toggle Off Color-based Changes the color of map icons to the color of their players Toggle Off

items.title: Roles 🎭
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default Set Fake Role Change your current role to any role you want(Shapeshifter & Phantom are disabled by default to prevent getting detected by the anticheat) Menu

items.title: Impostor
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default Kill Reach Allows you to kill players regardless of how far they are on the map Toggle Off

items.title: Shapeshifter
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default No Ss Animation Removes the shapeshift animation, making shapeshifting much quicker Toggle Off Endless Ss Duration Allows you to remain shapeshifted forever Toggle Off

items.title: Crewmate
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default Show Tasks Menu Show menu to complete tasks and see other players' tasks Menu

items.title: Tracker
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default Endless Tracking Allows you to track another player forever Toggle Off No Track Delay Removes the short delay between the tracked player and their icon on your tracker map Toggle Off No Track Cooldown Removes the cooldown period after tracking someone Toggle Off Track Reach Allows you to track players regardless of how far they are on the map Toggle Off

items.title: Engineer
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default Endless Vent Time Allows you to remain inside a vent forever despite being an engineer Toggle Off No Vent Cooldown Removes the cooldown period after coming out of a vent Toggle Off

items.title: Scientist
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default Endless Battery The battery on your vitals panel will never run out Toggle Off No Vitals Cooldown Removes the cooldown period after closing vitals panel Toggle Off

items.title: Detective
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default Interrogate Reach Allows you to interrogate players regardless of how far they are on the map Toggle Off

items.title: Ship 🚀
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default Fake Tasks Allow user to do literally any task Toggle Off Unfixable Lights Disables lights completely (they cannot be fixed manually by players)You can enable them again by clicking the button Toggle Off Call Meeting Call an emergency meeting Button Report Body Report any player as a dead body to start a meeting Button Close Meeting Forcefully closes the meeting window (only for you), allowing you to move and interact with the game during meetings Button Auto open doors on use Automatically open doors when clicked Toggle Off Kick offensive names Automatically kick people with offensive names (and auser) Toggle Off

items.title: Sabotage
items.text:
HyperMenu's Sabotage cheats work even if you aren't impostor and are subject to no cooldown.

Moreover, different sabotages can be enabled at the same time, and they even work during meetings.

Cheat Description Type Reactor Allows you to enable/disable Reactor sabotage Toggle Oxygen Allows you to enable/disable Oxygen sabotage Toggle Lights Allows you to enable/disable Lights sabotage Toggle Comms Allows you to enable/disable Communications sabotage Toggle Doors Opens a menu which allows you to open/close doors individually Button Mushroom Mixup Induces Mushroom Mixup sabotage on Fungle map Button Trigger Spores Induces spores on Fungle map Button Open Sabotage Map Opens sabotage map as if you are the Impostor Button

items.title: Vents
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default Unlock Vents Allows you to use vents even if you are not an impostor or an engineer Toggle Off Kick All from Vents Forcefully kicks all players from vents Button Walk in Vents Allows you to move and interact with the game even though you are inside of a ventThis gives you a sort of invisibility until you disable the setting and leave the vent(Some activites such as killing will forcefully make you visible again) Toggle Off

items.title: Chat 💬
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default Enable Chat Allow chat at all times during the game (example: alive outside meeting) Toggle Off Bypass URL Block Allow users to put URLs in the chat Toggle Off Lower rate limits Lower the cooldown on chat messages Toggle Off

items.title: Textbox
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default Unlock Extra Characters Allow typing symbols that the chat usually blocks Toggle Off Allow longer messages Increase character limit in message from 100 to 120 Toggle Off Unlock Clipboard Allow Copy & Paste in the chat Toggle Off

items.title: Animations 📽️
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default Shields Trigger shields animation Button Asteroids Toggle asteroids animation Toggle Off Empty Garbage Trigger empty garbage animation Button Medbay Scan Toggle medbay animation Toggle Off Cams In Use Toggle faking cameras in use Toggle Off

items.title: Client-Side
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default Moonwalk Toggle client-sided moonwalk animation Toggle Off

items.title: Host-Only 🔐
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default Bypass Host Only ⚠️ Allow using host-only features as non-host (WARNING: this will get you kicked by anticheat. Use at your own risk.) Toggle Off Kill while Vanished Allows you to kill as phantom while vanished Toggle Off Kill Anyone Allows you to kill anyone (even other impostors) Toggle Off No Kill Cooldown Removes kill cooldown Toggle Off Show Protect Menu Show a menu to protect other players Button

items.title: Murder
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default Kill Player Select a player to kill them immediatly Menu Telekill Player Select a player to teleport to them then kill them Menu Kill All Crewmates Kill all crewmates immediatly Button Kill All Impostors Kill all impostors immediatly Button Kill Everyone Kill all players immediatly Button

items.title: Game State
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default Force Start Game Force game to immediately start Button No Game End Prevent game from ending Toggle Off

items.title: Meetings
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default Skip Meeting End meeting and eject no one due to tie Button Vote Immune Prevent yourself from being voted out Toggle Off Eject Player Select a player to be ejected, this player will be voted out. Menu

items.title: Passive 💤
items.text:
These cheats are constantly running in the background and cannot be disabled to avoid problems.

Cheat Description Type Default Free Cosmetics Gives you access to all of the game's cosmetics for free, including:- Hats- Visors- Skins- Pets- Nameplates- Bundles- Cosmicubes Toggle On Avoid Penalties Removes the penalty you receive when disconnecting from games early Toggle On Unlock Extra Features Unlocks many of the game's special features automatically, including:- Freechat- Friend list- Custom name- Online gameplay Toggle On Copy Lobby Code on Disconnect Copies the lobby code to clipboard when you disconnect (including being kicked) Toggle Off Spoof Date to April 1st Forces the april fools update Toggle Off

items.title: Modes 💿
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default RGB Mode RGB GUI Toggle Off Stealth Mode Minimize risk of being kicked by anticheat Toggle Off Panic Mode Kill HyperMenu and restore normal Among Us GUI Button

items.title: Config 📃
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default Reload Config Reload config file Button Save to Profile Save HyperMenu profile Button Load from Profile Load HyperMenu Profile Button

items.title: GUI Settings
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default Menu Keybind Change Menu Keybind Text Entry Delete Menu Color (HTML) Set menu color (use hex color code such as #FF0000) Text Entry Open Menu on Mouse Position Open the menu on the position of your mouse when you press delete Toggle Off Auto-Load Profile on Startup Automatically load the HyperMenu profile when you start Among Us Toggle Off

items.title: Spoofing Settings
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default Spoof Level Spoof your player level for other players (from 1 to 100000) Text Entry Spoof Platform Spoof player platform. Use one from this list. Text Entry

items.title: Privacy Settings
items.text: Cheat Description Type Default Hide Device ID Toggle hardware ban prevention Toggle On Disable Telemetry Prevent Among Us from collecting data from your game Toggle On

items.title: Config File
items.text:
You can change all of the following settings in BepInEx/config/HyperMenu.cfg

Config Description Type Default GuestMode.GuestMode When enabled, a new guest account will generate every time you start the gameAllows you to bypass account bans and PUID detection Boolean false GuestMode.FriendName The username that will be used when setting a friend code for your guest accountIMPORTANT: - Can only be used with GuestMode- Needs to be ≤ 10 characters- Cannot include special characters/discriminator (#1234) String GUI.Keybind Specifies the keyboard key that toggles the GUI on/offIMPORTANT: You may only use keycodes from this list String Delete GUI.Color Sets the color of HyperMenu's GUI using HTML color codes String Privacy.HideDeviceId When enabled, it will hide your unique deviceId from Among UsCould potentially help bypass hardware bans in the future Boolean true Privacy.NoTelemetry When enabled, it will stop Among Us from collecting analytics of your games using Unity Analytics and sending them to Innersloth Boolean true Spoofing.Level Sets a custom player level to display to others in online games, masking your real levelIMPORTANT: Only integers between 0 and 4294967295 are valid. Decimal values are not accepted String Spoofing.Platform Sets a different gaming platform in online lobbies to disguise your actual platformIMPORTANT: You may only use platform names from this list String

items.title: Other relevant features
items.text: • HyperMenu has a simple GUI that is easy to navigate and can be toggled using the DELETE key on your keyboard

items.title: 🪟 Windows
items.text:
1. Download the latest HyperMenu zip pack from here.

    • For Steam or Itch.io: Download HyperMenu-VERSION-Steam-Itch.zip.
    • For Microsoft Store, Epic Games Store, or Xbox App: Not supported by HyperMenu. For these platforms, go to the original MalumMenu here.

  2. Open the zip file you have just downloaded and copy all its contents.

  3. Paste these files directly into your Among Us game folder:

    • Steam: Right-click Among Us in your Library → Click Manage → Click Browse local files.
    • Itch.io: Open the Itch.io app → Right-click Among Us in your Library → Click Manage → Click Open folder in Explorer.
    • Epic Launcher: Not currently supported by HyperMenu.
    • Microsoft Store: Not currently supported by HyperMenu.
    • Xbox App: Not currently supported by HyperMenu.

  4. Launch Among Us as you normally would. You should see a console window appear, installing the mod's requirements.

  5. Wait for the console window to finish the installation.

  6. After installation, Among Us will automatically open with HyperMenu successfully installed.

    • By default, you can toggle the cheat GUI on by pressing DELETE on your keyboard.

  7. If the installation doesn't work, check out our FAQ.

items.title: 🐧 Linux
items.text:
1. Run Among Us under Proton (or Wine).

  2. In Steam: Right-click Among Us in your Library → Click Properties → Click Compatibility → Enable Force the use of a specific Steam Play compatibility tool.

  3. Test different Proton versions if you're having issues launching the game.

  4. Set up BepInEx (the framework HyperMenu is built upon).

  5. Follow the official Proton / Wine setup guide found here.

  6. If you are using Proton with Steam, specify the DLL override:

    • In Steam: Right-click Among Us in your Library → Click Properties → Click General → Click Launch Options.
    • Add this to your launch options:
    WINEDLLOVERRIDES="winhttp.dll=n,b" %command%

  7. After that, continue with the Windows installation steps found here.

  8. Fix crashes or errors (like Unable to execute IL2CPP chainloader).

  9. In Steam: Right-click Among Us in your Library → Click Properties → Click General → Click Launch Options.

  10. Set your launch options to:

    PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 WINEDLLOVERRIDES="winhttp.dll=n,b" %command%
